item.title: Middle East Crisis & Global Energy Briefing
item.description:
Presenter: en-GB-SoniaNeural

  • Middle East crisis liveIran launches strikes on US bases in Gulf; oil prices drop after Trump ‘peace plan’ reportIran Guards said they fired missiles at Israel and US forces in bases in Kuwait, Jordan and Bahrain; crude oil prices fall sharply in early trading
  • UKUK offers to host international summit on reopening strait of Hormuz
  • AnalysisTrump’s rehashed 15-point Iran plan unlikely to appease Tehran
  • AnalysisTangled trail probably leads from Golders Green ambulance attack to TehranBritish investigators are circumspect but experts and security officials say incident has hallmarks of Iranian intelligence
  • Today in FocusThe Maga divide over Iran – podcastAndrew Roth on why the war on Iran is unpopular with the US public, and what it means for Maga insidersPodcast|24:06
  • UK inflation steady before Iran war; oil price dips on Trump comments
  • UK inflation held at 3% before global energy price hit from Iran war
  • UK offers to host international summit on reopening strait of Hormuz
item.itunes:author: en-GB-SoniaNeural
